'''鈭歞h-k-dh-z''' ('''kadhakdhezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vuln|vuln]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-k-dh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vuln|vuln]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-k-dh-z
|-
! Lemma
| kadhakdhezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhakdhezoko|thidhakdhezoko]] || [[word:jidhakdhezoko|jidhakdhezoko]] || [[word:shidhakdhezoko|shidhakdhezoko]] || [[word:kidhakdhezoko|kidhakdhezoko]]
|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
